assessor_raw: The model's reported performance cannot be attributed to improved lesion feature extraction without ruling out a camera-based shortcut. The training data structure ensures that a model can achieve perfect discrimination by learning only camera-derived features: old camera color response predicts academic center, academic center predicts melanoma. The researchers applied color augmentation to address this, but augmentation introduces stochastic per-image color variation — it does not remove the systematic, camera-model-level signal that appears consistently across all images from a given camera type. The prospective evaluation confirms improvement over the prior model, but pooling four clinics with structurally different camera and label characteristics means this improvement is consistent with camera-shortcut exploitation rather than improved clinical utility. The rollout period also includes a mid-study change at the academic center that increases its positive case contribution. The deployment conclusion for network-wide primary care screening is unsupported.
